title: DNA-level rRNA depletion for low-input bacterial RNA sequencing
author: Liu, Qiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains scripts and analysis workflows used in the study: 
 "DNA-level rRNA depletion for low-input bacterial RNA sequencing" 
 The repository includes bioinformatics pipelines, data processing scripts, and code used for figure generation and statistical analyses. The GitHub repository is linked to ensure long-term preservation and reproducibility.
steps_raw:
This repository contains scripts and analysis workflows used in the study: 
 "DNA-level rRNA depletion for low-input bacterial RNA sequencing" 
 The repository includes bioinformatics pipelines, data processing scripts, and code used for figure generation and statistical analyses. The GitHub repository is linked to ensure long-term preservation and reproducibility.
